fcReleaseDate.title: EA Sports FC 27 Release Date and Latest News
fcReleaseDate.subtitle: Follow the FC 27 reveal, release schedule, trailer, cover stars and official announcements — plus the first FC 27 carryover activities already live in FC 26.
fcReleaseDate.intro: EA has started referencing EA Sports FC 27 through official FC 26 carryover rewards. Track the reveal, trailer, cover athletes and release date here as EA announces them. Recent EA Sports FC titles have launched on the final Friday of September.

items.title: FC 27 Carryover Rewards Introduced
items.description: EA confirmed that selected objectives completed in FC 26 deliver rewards in FC 27. Use the same EA Account in both games and log in to FC 27 to receive every eligible reward.

items.title: Two FC 26 Activities Provide FC 27 Rewards
items.description: Play one group-stage match in The World's Game mode and complete every region in the Ultimate Team Journey of Nations objective group. Complete both activities before their event deadlines.

items.title: Season 9 Adds Another FC 27 Carryover Reward
items.description: FC 26 World Tour Season 9 includes an FC 27 carryover reward at Level 30. Season 9 carryover rewards become available in FC 27 in early October and must be redeemed with the same EA Account by the announced early-November deadline.

items.title: FC 27 Reveal and Cover Stars
items.description: EA's official FC website and news pages currently spotlight FC 26. Watch this tracker for the FC 27 reveal trailer, cover athletes, editions, platforms and the worldwide release date as they go live.

items.title: Recent Games Launched on the Final Friday of September
items.description: EA Sports FC 24 launched on September 29, 2023, FC 25 launched on September 27, 2024 and FC 26 launched worldwide on September 26, 2025.

fcPreOrderEditions.title: EA Sports FC 27 Pre-Order, Editions and Early Access
fcPreOrderEditions.subtitle: Compare the FC 27 edition lineup, preorder bonuses and early-access options against the FC 26 Standard, Ultimate and EA Play launch structure.
fcPreOrderEditions.intro: Compare the FC 27 edition lineup, preorder bonuses and early-access options. FC 26 set the benchmark with Standard and Ultimate editions, seven days of Ultimate Edition early access, a 10-hour EA Play trial and unlimited EA Play Pro access on PC.

items.launchAccess: Release and early-access dates to be confirmed
items.keyBenefits: Preorder bonuses, FC Points, Premium Pass content and edition-specific rewards will be detailed when editions go live
Full game, one Archetype Unlock Consumable, two Double Archetype XP Consumables for 10 matches, three Career ICONs, a five-star coach, a five-star youth scout and Manager Live Challenge content

items.launchAccess: Up to seven days before the Standard Edition
items.keyBenefits: Up to 6,000 FC Points over two months, Season 1 Premium Pass, an additional Ultimate Team Evolution slot, an untradeable FC 26 ICON item and the Standard Edition bonus content

items.option: FC 26 Ultimate Edition on Nintendo Switch
items.launchAccess: Up to seven days before the Standard Edition
items.keyBenefits: Up to 4,500 FC Points over two months instead of 6,000; FC 25 preorder content was excluded from Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 versions

items.price: Subscription price varies by platform and region
items.launchAccess: Select new-release trials for up to 10 hours
items.keyBenefits: Ten percent discount on EA digital game purchases, FC Points and downloadable content, plus rotating member rewards

items.launchAccess: FC 26 Ultimate Edition access began September 19, 2025
items.keyBenefits: Unlimited access while the membership remains active, Ultimate Edition content and EA Play Pro member benefits

fcPlatformsCrossplay.title: EA Sports FC 27 Platforms, Crossplay and PC Requirements
fcPlatformsCrossplay.subtitle: Review the FC 27 platform lineup, the official EA Sports FC crossplay groups and the FC 26 PC hardware requirements used as the latest benchmark.
fcPlatformsCrossplay.intro: EA Sports FC connects PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S and PC in one crossplay group, keeps PlayStation 4 and Xbox One in a separate group, and runs Nintendo Switch systems independently. The FC 26 PC specifications below serve as the latest hardware benchmark ahead of the FC 27 announcement.

items.notes: The official FC 27 product and store pages will list supported platforms and crossplay details at launch

items.platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S and PC
items.notes: Players can match within this group and cannot match with the PlayStation 4 and Xbox One generation
This group is separate from PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S and PC

items.crossplay: No crossplay with PC, PlayStation or Xbox
items.notes: Switch players use Nintendo-specific online and local multiplayer. Ultimate Team cross-progression is supported between Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2, but not between Nintendo systems and other platforms
AMD Ryzen 5 1600 or Intel Core i5-6600K, 8 GB RAM, AMD RX 570 or Nvidia GTX 1050 Ti, DirectX 12 and 100 GB available storage
AMD Ryzen 7 2700X or Intel Core i7-6700, 12 GB RAM, AMD RX 5600 XT or Nvidia GTX 1660, DirectX 12 and 100 GB available storage

items.platforms: EA app, Steam or Epic Games Store
items.notes: Broadband internet, an EA Account, EA client software and EA Javelin Anticheat are required on PC

fcUltimateTeam.title: EA Sports FC 27 Ultimate Team Beginner Guide
fcUltimateTeam.subtitle: Prepare your EA Account, secure FC 27 carryover rewards and follow a clear route through objectives, squad building, Rivals, Squad Battles, Evolutions and Champions.
fcUltimateTeam.intro: The best preparation starts in FC 26, where several activities already provide FC 27 rewards. When FC 27 launches, use the same EA Account, complete the introductory objectives, build a balanced first squad and begin with the mode that matches your skill level.

steps.title: Earn the FC 27 Carryover Rewards in FC 26
steps.description: Play one group-stage match in The World's Game mode and complete every region in the Journey of Nations Ultimate Team objective. World Tour Season 9 also provides an FC 27 carryover reward at Level 30.
steps.result: Eligible rewards become available after FC 27 launches

steps.title: Keep the Same EA Account
steps.description: Use the EA Account that earned your FC 26 rewards when creating or opening your FC 27 Ultimate Team club. Carryover rewards are tied to the account used to complete the original objectives.
steps.result: Your eligible FC 27 rewards deliver to the correct Ultimate Team club

steps.title: Set Up the Web App and Companion App
steps.description: The browser-based Web App and iOS or Android Companion App let you manage squads, complete Squad Building Challenges, claim rewards and use the Transfer Market away from your console or PC. FC 26's Web App opened on September 17, 2025 and its Companion App followed on September 18.
steps.result: You can organize your club before and between gameplay sessions

steps.title: Complete Foundations and Unlock the Transfer Market
steps.description: Finish the introductory Foundation objectives before spending heavily on players. In FC 26, new accounts completed the On Your Way objective group before full Transfer Market access opened after 24 hours on consoles or 48 hours on PC.
steps.result: You receive starter rewards and gain access to buying, bidding and searching the market

steps.title: Build a Balanced First Squad
steps.description: Fill every position with players who fit their natural roles and provide useful chemistry links. Keep early coins for important upgrades instead of replacing the entire team after every reward pack.
steps.result: A stable starting eleven with enough substitutes for objectives and rotating game modes

steps.title: Use Objectives and Evolutions for Upgrades
steps.description: Check daily, weekly, seasonal and event objectives before playing matches so each game contributes to several rewards. Evolutions upgrade eligible player items through gameplay tasks, and FC 26 introduced repeatable Evolutions and goalkeeper Evolutions.
steps.result: Regular squad improvements without relying only on Transfer Market purchases

steps.title: Start with Squad Battles or Division Rivals
steps.description: Squad Battles provides offline matches against CPU-controlled teams and allowed up to 18 weekly scoring matches in FC 26. Rivals begins in Division 10, runs through Divisions 10 to 1 plus the Elite Division, and provides weekly rewards based on progression.
steps.result: Choose Squad Battles for a controlled start or Rivals for online competition

steps.title: Move into Champions When Your Squad Is Ready
steps.description: FC 26 removed Champions Playoffs. Players earned Champions Qualification Points from Division 7 and automatically qualified from Division 6 after collecting enough points, while Challengers provided a separate competition for Division 7 and lower players.
steps.result: A clear route from beginner divisions into higher-level weekend competition

fcPlayerRatings.title: EA Sports FC 27 Player Ratings and Best Players
fcPlayerRatings.subtitle: Compare the latest official EA Sports FC ratings benchmark for elite players, pace leaders, young standouts and leaders in key positions.
fcPlayerRatings.intro: The official EA Sports FC ratings database powers direct comparison by overall rating, pace, shooting, passing, dribbling, defending and physicality. Use the category tags to find top-rated players, fastest players, young standouts and leaders in key positions.

fcCareerMode.title: EA Sports FC 27 Career Mode and Wonderkids
fcCareerMode.subtitle: Build a long-term save with Manager Career systems, Player Career Archetypes and a shortlist of highly rated young players.
fcCareerMode.intro: Start with Download Latest to load current transfers and ratings, then choose Manager Career or Player Career. This guide covers live scenarios, manager movement, deeper league simulation, scouting, player development and young players worth tracking from the official ratings database.

features.title: Manager Live
features.summary: A central hub for Full Career saves, Live Start Points and rotating challenges based on football storylines.
details: Challenges refresh on weekly and monthly cycles.
Scenarios can use special objectives, squad rules and starting conditions.
Challenge completion can award Career kits and Season Pass progress.

features.title: Manager Market
features.summary: Managers can move between clubs instead of remaining fixed for the entire save.
details: Opposition managers can be poached, sacked or pursue new jobs.
Manager movement creates changing tactical identities across the league.
Your own career can open new job opportunities as results and reputation change.

features.title: Deeper Simulation and Scouting
features.summary: Simulate more of the football world and use broader performance data when scouting transfer targets.
details: Select up to five additional leagues to simulate alongside your main league.
Selected leagues retain deeper player and competition data.
Use position, age, attributes and recent performance to narrow transfer targets.

features.title: Authentic Gameplay
features.summary: A Career-focused gameplay preset built around realistic tempo, positioning, passing variation and ball behavior.
details: Authentic Gameplay is the default Career preset.
Custom sliders can adjust assistance, error, fatigue and defensive behavior.
Competitive Gameplay provides a faster and more responsive match feel.

features.title: Unexpected Events
features.summary: Dynamic off-pitch events add squad-management decisions and changing storylines during a season.
details: Events can affect player availability, morale and planning.
The system creates different situations across separate saves.
Managers respond through squad rotation and short-term planning.

features.title: Player Career Archetypes
features.summary: Choose from 13 distinct Archetypes inspired by football greats and develop a player around a clear on-pitch identity.
details: Each Archetype has its own strengths, weaknesses and progression path.
Specializations add narrower roles and gameplay perks.
Training drills influence match XP gains for actions linked to your chosen style.

wonderkids.profile: Elite young creator with 90 dribbling, 86 passing and 85 pace.
Young ball-playing center back with 84 defending, 86 long passing and 85 jumping.
Left-footed right midfielder suited to wide development and creative attacking roles.
Explosive young striker with 87 pace, 78 dribbling and 84 jumping.
Young central midfielder suited to a long-term box-to-box or possession-focused role.
Creative left-footed midfielder with 83 passing, 83 dribbling and 81 long shots.

fcFormationsControls.title: EA Sports FC 27 Best Formations, Tactics and Controls
fcFormationsControls.subtitle: Choose a practical shape for possession, counters, pressing or defensive play, then learn the essential PlayStation, Xbox and PC inputs.
fcFormationsControls.intro: Start with a formation that matches your squad instead of forcing every team into one setup. Competitive Gameplay favors responsiveness and direct control, while Authentic Gameplay uses a more realistic tempo for offline modes such as Career.

items.label: 4-2-3-1 Wide — Balanced Control
items.summary: A safe all-round shape with two holding midfielders, three attacking midfielders and one striker.
roles: One holding CDM who stays central
One mobile CDM who supports progression
Wide midfielders who track back and carry the ball
A CAM who receives between midfield and defense
A striker who can link play or attack the box
items.matchPlan: Use short combinations through the double pivot, switch wide when the middle is crowded and keep at least one CDM behind the ball.

items.label: 4-3-3 Holding — Possession and Width
items.summary: A possession-friendly structure with a dedicated CDM, two central midfielders and natural width from both wingers.
roles: A defensive CDM screening the center backs
One creative CM and one balanced CM
Wingers who stretch the back line
Fullbacks who overlap only when midfield cover is secure
A striker who occupies center backs
items.matchPlan: Circulate through the midfield three, create triangles near the touchline and avoid sending both fullbacks forward at the same time.

items.label: 4-4-2 — Direct Counterattack
items.summary: A simple two-striker system that gives clear passing lanes, defensive width and quick counterattacking options.
roles: One striker who runs in behind
One striker who drops short or holds the ball
Wide midfielders who support both phases
One central midfielder who stays back
One central midfielder who carries forward
items.matchPlan: Defend in two compact lines, win the ball centrally and release a winger or the faster striker early.

items.label: 5-2-3 — Defensive Security
items.summary: A back-three system with wingbacks and three forwards for extra protection without losing counterattacking width.
roles: A central center back who holds position
Two outside center backs comfortable covering channels
Wingbacks with stamina and recovery pace
Two central midfielders who protect transitions
Wide forwards who stay ready for counters
items.matchPlan: Keep the midfield pair compact, release only one wingback at a time and attack quickly into the space outside the opponent's fullbacks.

items.label: Competitive vs Authentic Gameplay
items.summary: Use the gameplay preset that matches the mode and match feel you want.
roles: Competitive: tuned for faster responsiveness, consistency and direct control in Ultimate Team and Clubs.
Authentic: tuned for realistic tempo, positioning, ball behavior and fatigue in Manager Career and Player Career.
Use custom sliders in offline modes to fine-tune assistance, passing error, shooting error, fatigue and defensive behavior.
items.matchPlan: Pick Competitive for online play and Authentic for immersive offline Career saves.

items.label: Essential Attacking Controls
items.summary: Core inputs for passing, shooting, crossing, sprinting and protecting the ball.
roles: Ground Pass or Header — PlayStation X, Xbox A
Through Pass — PlayStation Triangle, Xbox Y
Shoot or Volley — PlayStation Circle, Xbox B
Lob Pass or Cross — PlayStation Square, Xbox X
Sprint — R2 on PlayStation, RT on Xbox
Protect Ball — L2 on PlayStation, LT on Xbox
Trigger Teammate Run — L1 on PlayStation, LB on Xbox
Call Teammate Short — R1 on PlayStation, RB on Xbox
items.matchPlan: PC players can remap every action in Customize Controls and use a controller for the full experience.

items.label: Essential Defending and Goalkeeper Controls
items.summary: Core inputs for switching, jockeying, pressing, tackling and rushing the goalkeeper.
roles: Change Player — L1 or Right Stick on PlayStation, LB or Right Stick on Xbox
Jockey — L2 on PlayStation, LT on Xbox
Sprint Jockey — L2 + R2 on PlayStation, LT + RT on Xbox
Standing Tackle — Circle on PlayStation, B on Xbox
Slide Tackle — Square on PlayStation, X on Xbox
Second Defender Press — Hold R1 on PlayStation, Hold RB on Xbox
Rush Goalkeeper — Hold Triangle on PlayStation, Hold Y on Xbox
items.matchPlan: Master jockeying and second-man press before relying on standing tackles.

items.label: PC Control Setup
items.summary: PC supports controller input and fully remappable keyboard controls.
roles: Open Settings and enter Customize Controls.
Choose controller or keyboard input.
Bind Ground Pass, Through Pass, Shoot, Cross, Sprint, Jockey and Player Switch first.
Use Input Overlay to confirm that local inputs are being registered during a match.
items.matchPlan: Save multiple control profiles if you switch between keyboard and controller.

fcClubsRush.title: EA Sports FC 27 Clubs and Rush Guide
fcClubsRush.subtitle: Create a Club, develop a Virtual Pro, climb divisions and play Rush, Live Events, Leagues and Playoffs with friends.
fcClubsRush.intro: Clubs progression is built around 13 Archetypes, Archetype XP, Attribute Points, Signature PlayStyles and Specializations. Players can join multiple clubs, compete through ten Rush divisions and enter rotating knockout events with special rules and rewards.

items.title: Create or Join a Club
items.summary: Build a team with friends or join an existing Club before selecting a position and entering the lobby.
facts: The lobby displays Role Fit and overall rating for open positions.
Set-piece assignments can be managed before matches.
Drop-In matches are available when your regular Club teammates are offline.

items.title: Choose an Archetype
items.summary: Select a clear playing identity for your Virtual Pro and develop it through matches and Skill Games.
facts: There are 13 distinct Archetypes.
The first Archetype is selected when entering Clubs.
Other Archetypes can be unlocked with Clubs Coins, FC Points or Archetype Unlock consumables.

items.title: Develop Your Virtual Pro
items.summary: Earn Archetype XP in matches, spend Attribute Points and unlock more ways to specialize your build.
facts: Role Rating provides the largest share of match AXP.
Gameplay actions also add AXP.
Signature PlayStyles can upgrade to PlayStyle+ through progression.
Custom PlayStyle slots require the relevant attribute thresholds.
Each Archetype has three Specialization paths and only one can be active at a time.

items.title: Use Multiple Clubs
items.summary: Move between different friend groups without leaving your main Club.
facts: A player can be a member of up to three clubs at the same time.
The Switch Clubs menu allows free movement between joined clubs.
Rush and Playoff rewards are earned for one selected favorite club.

items.title: Clubs Leagues and Playoffs
items.summary: Climb divisions during league play, qualify for Playoffs and compete for promotion and seasonal rewards.
facts: League performance determines divisional progress.
Playoffs provide a separate competitive target.
Foundations, Archetype, seasonal, weekly and daily objectives award progression rewards.

items.title: Clubs Rush
items.summary: Play fast 5-a-side matches and climb from the opening division toward Elite Rank.
facts: Clubs Rush contains ten divisions.
Be-A-Goalkeeper is supported for true 5-a-side matches.
Rush uses the Clubs Virtual Pro and Archetype progression system.
Competitive Gameplay is locked for Clubs.

items.title: Rush Live Events
items.summary: Enter rotating single-elimination tournaments with entry requirements, special rules and event rewards.
facts: Events can contain up to four knockout rounds.
Players have a limited number of attempts.
Entry rules can require a Rush rank, Archetype level or specific Archetype.
Special formats include Designated Scorer and Rugby Rush.
Rewards can include cosmetics, Archetype card backgrounds and progression consumables.

items.title: Play Online with Friends
items.summary: Invite friends through EA Connect and use cross-play within supported platform-generation groups.
facts: PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S play in the current-generation cross-play group.
PlayStation 4 and Xbox One play in the older-generation cross-play group.
Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 do not join the PC, PlayStation or Xbox cross-play pool.
Cross-play supports Clubs Drop-In, Friendlies, League, Playoffs, Practice, Rush and Live Events.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about EA Sports FC 27

questions.question: When is EA Sports FC 27 releasing?
questions.answer: EA Sports FC 27 is tracking toward a late-September release. EA Sports FC 24, FC 25 and FC 26 each launched on the final Friday of September, making that the established release window for FC 27. The exact worldwide release date will be confirmed in the official reveal.

questions.question: Which platforms will EA Sports FC 27 support?
questions.answer: EA Sports FC 27 is expected across the same platform family as recent titles: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Nintendo Switch, Nintendo Switch 2 and PC. Crossplay groups follow the EA Sports FC structure, with current-generation consoles and PC in one pool and Nintendo Switch running independently.

questions.question: Will EA Sports FC 27 have Ultimate Team carryover rewards?
questions.answer: Yes. EA has confirmed that selected FC 26 activities provide EA Sports FC 27 rewards. Play a group-stage match in The World's Game mode, complete every region in the Journey of Nations objective, and reach Level 30 in FC 26 World Tour Season 9, then use the same EA Account in FC 27 to receive the rewards.

questions.question: What is EA Sports FC 27 Ultimate Team?
questions.answer: EA Sports FC 27 Ultimate Team is the card-based squad mode where you build a club from player items, complete objectives, trade on the Transfer Market, run Evolutions, and compete in Division Rivals, Squad Battles and Champions. The Web App and Companion App let you manage your squad away from your console or PC.

questions.question: How does crossplay work in EA Sports FC 27?
questions.answer: EA Sports FC 27 crossplay connects players within platform-generation groups. PC, PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S form the current-generation group, PlayStation 4 and Xbox One form the previous-generation group, and Nintendo Switch systems stay separate. Ultimate Team cross-progression is supported between Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2.

questions.question: Where can I find EA Sports FC 27 player ratings?
questions.answer: EA Sports FC 27 player ratings come from the official EA Sports FC ratings database, which covers overall rating, pace, shooting, passing, dribbling, defending and physicality. Use the Player Ratings guide to compare top-rated players, pace leaders, the best young players and leaders by position.
